title: Project Overview
description: Start with the README and package manifest to understand what Palace52 is, how it runs locally, and which framework stack it uses.

title: Application Shell
description: Follow the root layout into the public and authenticated shells to see how pages are wrapped, branded, and gated by login state.

title: Authentication And Profile
description: Inspect the local auth helpers, NextAuth route, account actions, and profile page that show user identity and saved training history.

title: Build Palaces And PAO Decks
description: Walk through the builder route, client builder component, and persistence actions for custom routes and PAO card mappings.

title: Play Modes And Session Saving
description: Study how the play page prepares a mode, runs the interactive game, grades answers, and saves completed session results.

title: Dashboard And Leaderboard
description: See how dashboard metrics, progress charts, and leaderboard rankings are calculated from completed training sessions.

title: Database Model
description: Finish at Prisma to connect the code paths back to persisted users, palaces, cards, sessions, reviews, and auth tables.
